name: fireflies
description: Read meeting transcripts, summaries, and teammates from Fireflies.ai

envVars.name: FIREFLIES_API_KEY
envVars.description: Fireflies API key from the Fireflies integrations page

tools.name: List Transcripts
tools.description: List meeting transcripts, optionally filtered by date, participants, or keyword

endpoint.query: query($limit: Int, $skip: Int, $mine: Boolean, $fromDate: DateTime, $toDate: DateTime, $participants: [String], $keyword: String) { transcripts(limit: $limit, skip: $skip, mine: $mine, fromDate: $fromDate, toDate: $toDate, participants: $participants, keyword: $keyword) { id title date duration organizer_email participants transcript_url } }

skip.description: Number of transcripts to skip for pagination

mine.description: Only meetings organized by the API key owner

fromDate.description: Only meetings after this ISO 8601 timestamp

toDate.description: Only meetings before this ISO 8601 timestamp

keyword.description: Search meeting titles and spoken content

tools.name: Get Transcript
tools.description: Get a transcript with its sentences and AI summary

endpoint.query: query($id: String!) { transcript(id: $id) { id title date duration organizer_email participants transcript_url summary { overview action_items keywords } sentences { index speaker_name text start_time end_time } } }

tools.name: Search Transcripts
tools.description: Keyword-search transcripts and return matches with summaries

endpoint.query: query($keyword: String, $limit: Int) { transcripts(keyword: $keyword, limit: $limit) { id title date duration organizer_email summary { overview } } }

keyword.description: Keyword to search in titles and spoken content

tools.name: List Users
tools.description: List teammates in the Fireflies workspace

endpoint.query: query { users { user_id name email num_transcripts is_admin } }

tools.name: Get User
tools.description: Get a workspace user by ID

endpoint.query: query($id: String!) { user(id: $id) { user_id name email num_transcripts minutes_consumed is_admin } }

prompts.title: Recent meetings
prompts.prompt: List my Fireflies meeting transcripts from the last week with titles, dates, and participants.

prompts.title: Summarize a meeting
prompts.prompt: Get the Fireflies transcript for my latest meeting and summarize the key points and action items.

SETUP_GUIDE.title: Fireflies API Setup

steps.title: Sign in to Fireflies
steps.description: Go to https://app.fireflies.ai and sign in. Free accounts can use the API; record at least one test meeting so transcripts exist.

steps.title: Get your API key
steps.description: Open Integrations → Fireflies API (https://app.fireflies.ai/integrations/custom/fireflies) and copy your API key.

steps.title: Set the environment variable
steps.description: Add the key to your .env as FIREFLIES_API_KEY=...

steps.title: Verify access
steps.description: Run List Users — it should return at least your own account.

notes: All requests are GraphQL POSTs to https://api.fireflies.ai/graphql with 'Authorization: Bearer <key>'
transcripts is capped at 50 results per query; paginate with skip
Business/Enterprise plans unlock some fields (e.g. full AI summaries) that may be null on lower tiers
